'''鈭歜-s-f-ch''' ('''kabasfechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voodoo|voodoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voodoo|voodoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-s-f-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabasfechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasfechoko|thibasfechoko]] || [[word:jibasfechoko|jibasfechoko]] || [[word:shibasfechoko|shibasfechoko]] || [[word:kibasfechoko|kibasfechoko]]
